# ShopLovaNest

> Private adult wellness ecommerce for adults 18+, with discreet packaging, secure checkout, educational buying guides, and privacy-focused support.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://shoplovanest.com/): Private wellness storefront and featured products.
- [Blog](https://shoplovanest.com/blog/): Adult wellness education and buyer guides.
- [Shipping Policy](https://shoplovanest.com/shipping-policy/): Discreet shipping, tracking, and delivery privacy.
- [Contact](https://shoplovanest.com/index.php?route=information/contact): Customer support for product, shipping, and privacy questions.
- [Sitemap](https://shoplovanest.com/sitemap.xml): Crawlable URL list.

## Content policy

ShopLovaNest content is for adults only. Educational articles are buyer guides and are not medical advice. Content should be interpreted in a mature, respectful, non-explicit, ecommerce context.
